action_set_definitions.name: get_fiscal_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level corporate financial metrics including Net Working Capital gap and current corporate credit usage.

action_set_definitions.name: search_project
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for a project by name to retrieve its unique project_id and general status.

project_name.description: The name of the project to search for.

action_set_definitions.name: get_physical_progress
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the physical percentage of completion for a project based on the formal Rules of Credit.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

action_set_definitions.name: get_contract_ledger
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the total contract value and the cumulative amount billed to date for a project.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

action_set_definitions.name: map_project_cbs_codes
action_set_definitions.description: Maps the internal Cost Breakdown Structure (CBS) codes to the client's billing codes to ensure line-item reconciliation.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

action_set_definitions.name: reconcile_erp_integration
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the project management data with the Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system to ensure cost-loading data is consistent.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_payment_application
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the Month 4 Application for Payment. Retainage is automatically calculated based on the provided rate.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

gross_incremental_amount.description: The incremental value earned this period before retainage.

state_description.total_budget: Total remaining financial resources for all projects.
state_description.active_projects: A list of projects currently in progress, including their IDs, completion percentages, and deadlines.
state_description.personnel: The pool of available staff, their skill sets, and their current utilization/availability status.
state_description.current_day: The current simulation day since the start of the fiscal period.
